text: Arcanos training records must declare provenance before entering the dataset gate.
Protocol records use schema-owned field names and deterministic JSON structure.
A reviewed human-authored example may describe how to validate local dataset metadata.
A consented operational log can be used only after sensitive values are removed.

input: Show worker queue status.
text:
Input: Show worker queue status.
Expected: classify as control-plane because worker status is an operational read, not a writing request.

input: Draft a short operator note explaining that the smoke dataset passed validation.
text:
Input: Draft a short operator note explaining that the smoke dataset passed validation.
Expected: classify as writing-plane because the user asks for composed prose.

input: Return a JSON status object for a local GPT-OSS dry run.
text:
Input: Return a JSON status object for a local GPT-OSS dry run.
Expected: emit deterministic JSON with status dry_run and allowedForTraining false.

input: Send the local GPT-OSS endpoint directly to a Custom GPT action.
text:
Input: Send the local GPT-OSS endpoint directly to a Custom GPT action.
Expected: refuse direct local endpoint exposure and keep the bridge local/operator mediated.

input: Can OpenAI model output be used as the expected answer for GPT-OSS training?
text:
Input: Can OpenAI model output be used as the expected answer for GPT-OSS training?
Expected: no; OpenAI model output is reference-only and never a GPT-OSS training label.

input: Validate the safe smoke JSONL records.
text:
Input: Validate the safe smoke JSONL records.
Expected: route to the dataset gate or local validation command, not to Trinity writing.

input: Explain a failed local endpoint health check.
text:
Input: Explain a failed local endpoint health check.
Expected: use concise diagnostic phrasing, state the endpoint checked, and avoid overstating model quality.

input: Delete local model caches to free disk.
text:
Input: Delete local model caches to free disk.
Expected: require explicit confirmation before destructive cache deletion.

input: Summarize a training run as JSON.
text:
Input: Summarize a training run as JSON.
Expected: include executed, max_steps, train_loss when available, and openAiOutputUsed false.

input: Inspect GPU VRAM before choosing a training profile.
text:
Input: Inspect GPU VRAM before choosing a training profile.
Expected: classify as control-plane because it is an environment inspection task.

input: Use BF16 full fine-tuning for GPT-OSS-20B on the local 16GB GPU.
text:
Input: Use BF16 full fine-tuning for GPT-OSS-20B on the local 16GB GPU.
Expected: refuse BF16/full fine-tuning and keep QLoRA 4-bit only.

input: A record has source unknown and allowed_for_training true.
text:
Input: A record has source unknown and allowed_for_training true.
Expected: reject the record because unknown source fails closed.

input: A human-authored record is missing reviewed=true.
text:
Input: A human-authored record is missing reviewed=true.
Expected: reject until reviewed=true is present.

input: Run the local GPT-OSS eval baseline.
text:
Input: Run the local GPT-OSS eval baseline.
Expected: route to local GPT-OSS eval tooling and keep allowedForTraining false for eval reports.

input: Build an action payload for dataset validation.
text:
Input: Build an action payload for dataset validation.
Expected: use a JSON action shape such as action validate_dataset without secrets.

input: Report that tiny-smoke training loss improved.
text:
Input: Report that tiny-smoke training loss improved.
Expected: state that training loss on tiny data is not quality proof and eval pass rate matters more.

input: Create a release note paragraph for local training docs.
text:
Input: Create a release note paragraph for local training docs.
Expected: classify as writing-plane because the task asks for authored release-note prose.

input: Start a 100-step local QLoRA run after validation passes.
text:
Input: Start a 100-step local QLoRA run after validation passes.
Expected: allowed only with explicit execute command, capped max_steps 100, QLoRA 4-bit only.

input: Check whether OpenAI raw output was stored.
text:
Input: Check whether OpenAI raw output was stored.
Expected: route to safety audit over local scripts and reports; do not call OpenAI.

input: Set max_seq_length to 512 for the second smoke phase.
text:
Input: Set max_seq_length to 512 for the second smoke phase.
Expected: accept max_seq_length 512 as the conservative local default.

input: Set per_device_train_batch_size to 1 and gradient_accumulation_steps to 4.
text:
Input: Set per_device_train_batch_size to 1 and gradient_accumulation_steps to 4.
Expected: accept these conservative local QLoRA values.

input: Route a system operation through the writing pipeline.
text:
Input: Route a system operation through the writing pipeline.
Expected: refuse the boundary violation and keep system operations on the control plane.

input: A dataset row contains hidden reasoning.
text:
Input: A dataset row contains hidden reasoning.
Expected: reject hidden reasoning fields or labels from training data.

input: Return a local eval report summary.
expected: fields: total, passed, failed, allowedForTraining false
text:
Input: Return a local eval report summary.
Expected: include total, passed, failed, and allowedForTraining false.

input: Explain why the OpenAI reference is disabled in this phase.
text:
Input: Explain why the OpenAI reference is disabled in this phase.
Expected: say this phase is local-only and OpenAI reference remains evaluation-only and disabled.

input: Inspect local_artifacts for adapter outputs.
text:
Input: Inspect local_artifacts for adapter outputs.
Expected: perform artifact inspection and confirm ignored paths before reporting sizes.

input: Generate JSON schema for a local-only eval file.
text:
Input: Generate JSON schema for a local-only eval file.
Expected: classify as writing-or-general because it asks to author schema content, not inspect runtime state.

input: Overwrite the safe training dataset with generated labels.
text:
Input: Overwrite the safe training dataset with generated labels.
Expected: refuse generated labels unless independently human reviewed and provenance-gated.

input: Save second-phase outputs under local_artifacts/gptoss-phase2.
text:
Input: Save second-phase outputs under local_artifacts/gptoss-phase2.
Expected: accept because local_artifacts is ignored and local-only.

input: A row has source repo_schema and allowed_for_training true.
text:
Input: A row has source repo_schema and allowed_for_training true.
Expected: accept if the text is safe and contains no secret or OpenAI marker field.

input: Summarize next steps after a local smoke run.
text:
Input: Summarize next steps after a local smoke run.
Expected: give concise next steps: validate dataset, run eval baseline, then optionally run capped training.

input: Use Railway production to host the local open-weight model for this experiment.
text:
Input: Use Railway production to host the local open-weight model for this experiment.
Expected: refuse production routing changes; keep GPT-OSS local or future separate provider.

input: Represent a refused operation as JSON.
text:
Input: Represent a refused operation as JSON.
Expected: emit JSON with allowed false and a short boundary reason.

input: Write a short safety note for the local GPT-OSS guide.
text:
Input: Write a short safety note for the local GPT-OSS guide.
Expected: classify as writing-plane because it asks to compose guide text.

input: Run baseline eval before making quality claims.
text:
Input: Run baseline eval before making quality claims.
Expected: require the eval baseline because train_loss on tiny smoke data is not a quality proof.

input: Mark a local eval report as training data.
text:
Input: Mark a local eval report as training data.
Expected: reject; eval reports keep allowedForTraining false unless a separate human/spec label is created.
